fileLibrary.contractBoundaryDescription: The frontend only renders the public file projection. When the contract is missing, it keeps the degraded workbench tied to backend issue #229.
fileLibrary.degradedDescription: The revealed files public projection is still tracked by backend issue #229. The workbench entry stays visible without showing a missing contract as an empty file workspace.
fileLibrary.degradedSafeDetail: Session grouping, project filters, favorites, and preview controls stay in the workbench context without bypassing ACLs or exposing unauthorized file URLs.
fileLibrary.issueReferenceDetail: Backend issue #229 still tracks the revealed files public projection. The frontend keeps this degraded workbench instead of showing the missing contract as an empty file workspace.
fileLibrary.recoveryDetail: Recovery condition: after #229 lands, these endpoints must return session groups, stats, preview URL policy, and permission metadata before the page can move from degraded to ready.
fileLibrary.title: File Workbench

imageViewer.hint: Scroll/Pinch to zoom · Drag/Swipe to move · ESC to close

landing.agentSystemDesc: Coordinate multi-step agent work, task handoffs, streaming output, and extensible agent types for real internal workflows.
landing.architectureDesc: Deploy a FastAPI + React workspace with LangGraph/deepagents execution, Redis/MongoDB persistence, sandbox isolation, and extension layers for MCP, Skills, memory, and model providers.
landing.channelsIntegrationsDesc: Bring governed agents into Feishu/Lark and other team channels with project binding, model selection, and notification workflows.
landing.coreFeaturesDesc: Give platform teams centralized control over models, tools, permissions, and operations while business teams use agents to deliver work.
landing.ctaDescription: Connect your models, MCP servers, Skills, and enterprise channels, then give teams a governed place to use AI in daily work.
landing.customSkillsMcpDesc: Package reusable workflows as Skills and connect MCP servers so agents can use approved internal tools and team standards.
landing.documentSupportDesc: Preview PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, Markdown, Mermaid, images, and generated files with cloud storage for business deliverables.
landing.feedbackSystemDesc: Collect thumbs ratings, comments, session-linked feedback, and run-level signals so platform teams can improve agent quality.
landing.footerTagline: Self-hosted AI Agent workspace for enterprise teams.
landing.frontendFeaturesDesc: A responsive, multilingual web workspace with dark/light themes, rich content rendering, and familiar chat interaction.
landing.heroDescription: Deploy a private AI Agent workspace for your enterprise. Govern models, MCP tools, Skills, permissions, and channels while business teams deliver reports, presentations, analysis, and workflow automation from web and Feishu/Lark.
landing.mainInterfaceDesc: A unified web entry point for streaming agent work, rich documents, files, shared sessions, and reusable workflows.
landing.managementPanelsDesc: Manage Agents, models, Skills, MCP servers, roles, feedback, settings, and shared sessions from one operational dashboard.
landing.mcpIntegrationDesc: Govern system and user MCP servers with encrypted secrets, dynamic caching, SSE/HTTP transports, import/export, and tool-level access control.
landing.modelManagementDesc: Centralize OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Kimi, and other providers with channel routing, role visibility, user defaults, and fallback models.
landing.observabilityDesc: Use tracing, structured logs, health checks, user management, and access controls to operate agents with confidence.
landing.realtimeStorageDesc: Keep long-running agent sessions live with Redis + MongoDB dual-write, WebSocket updates, auto reconnect, sharing, and project folders.
landing.responsiveDesignDesc: Review sessions, share results, and monitor agent work across desktop, tablet, and mobile.
landing.sandboxExecutionDesc: Run agent tasks inside isolated sandboxes (Daytona / E2B) with controlled execution, environment isolation, and safety.
landing.securityAuthDesc: Protect model and tool access with JWT, RBAC, OAuth, email verification, CAPTCHA, and sandbox execution boundaries.
landing.skillsSystemDesc: Manage reusable internal workflows with dual storage, access control, GitHub sync, marketplace publishing, batch operations, and authoring tools.
landing.taskManagementDesc: Operate long-running work with concurrency control, cancellation, heartbeat monitoring, and pub/sub notifications.
landing.webSearchDesc: Rich web search with domain filtering, time range filters, region support, and configurable content size control.

profile.termsItem1: In accordance with the Interim Measures for the Management of Generative Artificial Intelligence Services, content generated by generative AI should reflect socialist core values and must not produce illegal or non-compliant information, such as political speech, pornography, gun violence, circumvention tools, military or war content, etc. Content on this platform is generated by AI. Users should verify the authenticity of information. It is strictly prohibited to use generative AI for inducement, deception, or discrimination based on race, ethnicity, religion, nationality, region, gender, age, or occupation. Respect intellectual property rights and business ethics. Do not use algorithms, data, or platform advantages for unfair competition. Users must respect the lawful rights of others and prevent content that harms others' physical or mental health, portrait rights, reputation, personal privacy, or intellectual property.
profile.termsItem2: Content on this platform is generated by AI. Users should independently verify the authenticity of information produced by large AI models!
profile.termsItem3: Violation of the Interim Measures for the Management of Generative Artificial Intelligence Services will result in the account being banned!
profile.termsItem4: Chat2API is strictly prohibited on this platform. Any violation will result in account suspension!
profile.termsItem5: This platform is for learning and reference only. Do not use it for illegal purposes!
profile.termsItem6: Note: If you encounter unknown websites or contact information during use, please do not trust them!
profile.title: Profile

validation.selectPermission: Please select at least one permission

agents.description: Configure and manage AI agents. Set up system prompts, select models, define tools, and orchestrate multi-agent workflows for complex tasks.
agents.title: AI Agents

apps.description: Company internal systems and frequently used site navigation.
apps.title: Company Apps

channels.description: Manage communication channels. Connect external messaging platforms and notification services for multi-channel AI interactions.
channels.title: Communication Channels

chat.description: Have intelligent conversations with AI agents. Multi-model switching, real-time streaming responses, session management, file uploads, and multi-agent collaboration.
chat.title: AI Chat

feedback.description: View and manage user feedback. Track feature requests, bug reports, and user satisfaction to drive product improvements.
feedback.title: User Feedback

files.description: Governed file workbench entry for revealed files and artifacts. The page stays degraded until backend file projections are available.
files.title: File Workbench

landing.description: AI Platform is a company-internal governed AI workbench for chat, Skills, MCP tools, files, artifacts, and workflows.
landing.title: AI Platform - Enterprise AI Workbench

marketplace.description: Discover and install community-built AI skills. Browse, rate, and deploy pre-built capabilities to extend your AI agent functionality.
marketplace.title: Skill Marketplace

mcp.description: Manage Model Context Protocol server connections. Connect external tools, databases, and services to extend AI agent capabilities.
mcp.title: MCP Server Management

memory.description: View and manage AI memory content. Persistent context and knowledge storage for long-term AI agent understanding across conversations.
memory.title: AI Memory Space

models.description: Manage LLM model configurations. Connect and switch between Claude, GPT, Gemini, and other models with unified API abstraction.
models.title: Model Management

notifications.description: Manage system announcements and notifications. Stay updated with platform news, alerts, and important messages.
notifications.title: Notifications

persona.description: Governed persona workbench entry for preset discovery and management. The page stays degraded until backend persona projections are available.
persona.title: Persona Presets

roles.description: Configure roles and granular permissions. Define access control policies for teams, resources, and administrative functions.
roles.title: Roles & Permissions

settings.description: Configure application and system settings. Manage global preferences, integrations, security policies, and platform behavior.
settings.title: System Settings

skills.description: Create, configure, and manage AI skills. Build powerful custom capabilities with prompt engineering, tool integration, and modular skill composition.
skills.title: Skills Management

users.description: Manage user accounts, roles, and access permissions. Administer multi-tenant user lifecycle and security settings.
users.title: User Management

settingDesc.ADMIN_CONTACT_EMAIL: Administrator contact email displayed to users in the About dialog
settingDesc.ADMIN_CONTACT_URL: Administrator contact/support URL (e.g. help desk, feedback form) displayed to users in the About dialog
settingDesc.APP_BASE_URL: Public base URL for file download/upload URLs (e.g. http://10.56.0.211:18001). Required when behind a reverse proxy where request.base_url is incorrect.
settingDesc.AUDIO_TRANSCRIPTION_API_KEY: API key for the audio transcription provider. Supports OpenAI-compatible endpoints such as OpenAI and SiliconFlow.
settingDesc.AUDIO_TRANSCRIPTION_BASE_URL: Base URL for the audio transcription provider (for example https://api.openai.com/v1 or https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1). Leave empty to use the default OpenAI endpoint.
settingDesc.AUDIO_TRANSCRIPTION_MODEL: Default transcription model name for the audio_transcribe tool, for example gpt-4o-mini-transcribe or FunAudioLLM/SenseVoiceSmall.
settingDesc.CHECKPOINT_BACKEND: Checkpoint storage backend. Use 'postgres' to avoid MongoDB's 16MB document size limit on long conversations.
settingDesc.CHECKPOINT_PG_DB: PostgreSQL database for checkpoint storage. Leave empty to use POSTGRES_DB.
settingDesc.CHECKPOINT_PG_HOST: PostgreSQL host for checkpoint storage. Leave empty to use POSTGRES_HOST.
settingDesc.CHECKPOINT_PG_PASSWORD: PostgreSQL password for checkpoint storage. Leave empty to use POSTGRES_PASSWORD.
settingDesc.CHECKPOINT_PG_POOL_MAX_SIZE: Checkpoint PostgreSQL connection pool maximum size
settingDesc.CHECKPOINT_PG_POOL_MIN_SIZE: Checkpoint PostgreSQL connection pool minimum size
settingDesc.CHECKPOINT_PG_USER: PostgreSQL username for checkpoint storage. Leave empty to use POSTGRES_USER.
settingDesc.DAYTONA_AUTO_ARCHIVE_INTERVAL: Daytona sandbox auto-archive interval in minutes
settingDesc.DAYTONA_AUTO_DELETE_INTERVAL: Daytona sandbox auto-delete interval in minutes after being archived
settingDesc.DAYTONA_AUTO_STOP_INTERVAL: Daytona sandbox auto-stop interval in minutes
settingDesc.DAYTONA_IMAGE: Daytona sandbox image (snapshot) to use for creating sandboxes
settingDesc.DEFAULT_AGENT: Default agent type for new sessions
settingDesc.DEFAULT_MODEL_ID: Admin default model configuration for new sessions and background jobs. Empty uses the first enabled model.
settingDesc.DEFAULT_USER_ROLE: Default role for newly registered users
settingDesc.DEFERRED_TOOL_SEARCH_LIMIT: Maximum number of results returned by tool search
settingDesc.DEFERRED_TOOL_THRESHOLD: Total tool count threshold above which MCP tools are deferred (0 = always defer)
settingDesc.E2B_AUTO_PAUSE: Automatically pause sandbox on timeout instead of killing (preserves filesystem and memory state)
settingDesc.E2B_AUTO_RESUME: Automatically resume paused sandbox on next activity (requires E2B_AUTO_PAUSE)
settingDesc.E2B_TIMEOUT: E2B sandbox timeout in seconds (max 3600 on Hobby, 86400 on Pro)
settingDesc.EMAIL_ENABLED: Enable email service (password reset, email verification)
settingDesc.ENABLE_AUDIO_TRANSCRIPTION: Enable audio transcription tool for transcribing audio files
settingDesc.ENABLE_DEFERRED_TOOL_LOADING: Enable deferred tool loading for MCP tools (reduces initial context size)
settingDesc.ENABLE_EVENT_MERGER: Enable event merger to reduce event count
settingDesc.ENABLE_LOCAL_FILESYSTEM_FALLBACK: Allow reveal/download flows to fall back to the server's local filesystem when backend download fails
settingDesc.ENABLE_SANDBOX: Enable sandbox environment for running code
settingDesc.FILE_UPLOAD_MAX_FILES: Maximum number of files per upload
settingDesc.FILE_UPLOAD_MAX_SIZE_AUDIO: Maximum audio file size in MB
settingDesc.FILE_UPLOAD_MAX_SIZE_DOCUMENT: Maximum document file size in MB
settingDesc.FILE_UPLOAD_MAX_SIZE_IMAGE: Maximum image file size in MB
settingDesc.FILE_UPLOAD_MAX_SIZE_VIDEO: Maximum video file size in MB
settingDesc.LLM_MAX_RETRIES: LLM API max retry count (for handling 429 and other errors)
settingDesc.LLM_MODEL_CACHE_SIZE: LLM model instance cache size (~10-30MB per instance). Default 50, supports multi-user/multi-parameter scenarios. Too small causes frequent create/destroy, too large consumes more memory.
settingDesc.LLM_RETRY_DELAY: LLM API retry base wait time in seconds (exponential backoff starting value)
settingDesc.LOCAL_STORAGE_PATH: Local storage path when S3 is not enabled (default: ./uploads)
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_API_BASE: API base URL for memory LLM operations. Leave empty to use the first available model's API base.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_API_KEY: API key for memory LLM operations. Leave empty to use the first available model's API key.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_APPEND_MAX_DETAILS: Maximum number of appended detail entries kept on project/reference memories before older detail entries are trimmed.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_AUTO_COMPACT_ENABLED: Enable the background memory compaction agent.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_AUTO_COMPACT_INTERVAL_SECO: How often the memory compaction agent scans for users over the threshold.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_AUTO_COMPACT_MIN_INTERVAL_: Minimum seconds between compaction attempts for the same user.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_AUTO_COMPACT_THRESHOLD: Number of memories per user that triggers automatic compaction.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_COMPACTION_MODEL_ID: Admin model configuration used by the background memory compaction agent. Leave empty to use the default model.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_EMBEDDING_API_BASE: Embedding API base URL for vector search (OpenAI-compatible). Leave empty for text-only mode.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_INDEX_CACHE_TTL: Memory index cache TTL in seconds (per-user)
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_INDEX_ENABLED: Inject memory index into system prompt for context awareness
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_INLINE_CONTENT_MAX_CHARS: Maximum number of characters to keep inline in MongoDB before offloading the full memory body to the store backend.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_MAX_TOKENS: Max tokens for memory LLM responses (extraction, consolidation, reranking). Higher values produce longer summaries but cost more.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_MODEL: LLM model for memory extraction, consolidation, and reranking. Leave empty to use the first available model.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_PRUNE_THRESHOLD: Days after which never-accessed memories are pruned during consolidation
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_RERANK_API_BASE: API base URL for the native memory rerank model endpoint.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_RERANK_API_KEY: API key for the native memory rerank model endpoint.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_RERANK_MODEL: Dedicated rerank model for native memory recall. Leave empty to use local reranking.
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_STALENESS_DAYS: Days before a memory is considered stale (shown with warning in recall results)
settingDesc.NATIVE_MEMORY_STORE_NAMESPACE: Base namespace used when storing long native memory bodies in the shared store backend.
settingDesc.PASSWORD_RESET_EXPIRE_HOURS: Password reset link expiration in hours
settingDesc.S3_CUSTOM_DOMAIN: Custom CDN domain for S3 files
settingDesc.S3_ENABLED: Enable S3-compatible storage for file uploads
settingDesc.S3_ENDPOINT_URL: S3 endpoint URL (required for MinIO and custom providers)
settingDesc.S3_INTERNAL_UPLOAD_MAX_SIZE: Maximum internal upload size in bytes (default: 50MB)
settingDesc.S3_PRESIGNED_URL_EXPIRES: Presigned URL expiration time in seconds (default: 7 days)
settingDesc.S3_PUBLIC_BUCKET: Whether the S3 bucket is publicly readable
settingDesc.SESSION_TITLE_API_BASE: LLM API base URL for title generation (leave empty to use main LLM API)
settingDesc.SESSION_TITLE_API_KEY: LLM API key for title generation (leave empty to use main LLM API key)
settingDesc.SESSION_TITLE_PROMPT: Prompt template for generating session titles. Use {lang} and {message} as placeholders.
settingDesc.SSE_CACHE_TTL: Redis TTL for SSE events in seconds
settingDesc.TURNSTILE_REQUIRE_ON_PASSWORD_CHANGE: Require Turnstile verification on password change
settingDesc.WELCOME_SUGGESTIONS: Welcome page suggestions displayed to users (multi-language JSON object keyed by language code)

models.adminGovernanceDescription: Create, order, key, and gateway settings are available only through model:admin governed controls.

agentDirectory.subtitle: Browse approved Agents from the public projection. Configuration writes stay governed.

ready.title: Ready

forbidden.description: This page remains visible in the workbench, but your account is missing {{permission}}. Ask an administrator to grant access before using its controls.

audit.description: User audit, import, and deactivation are shown as governed states; writes remain administrator-audited.

directory.description: The company directory reads the safe workbench projection and does not trigger legacy write APIs.

lifecycle.description: Create, disable, and role-assignment writes open only with administrator permissions and audit coverage.

details.adminProjection: Admin controls: lifecycle writes and role assignment stay permission-gated and do not connect directly to legacy /api/users writes.
details.auditProjection: Audit boundary: imports, deactivation, and permission changes require actor, time, source, and rollback hints.
details.nextContract: Backed contract: the company directory is safe to read; lifecycle writes remain governed by administrator projections.
details.publicProjection: Current state: the authenticated workbench reads the company directory projection and ordinary users do not trigger legacy write APIs.

users.description: The company directory is connected to the safe workbench projection. Creation, deactivation, and role assignment remain administrator-audited.

runtime.description: System runtime configuration is shown from the read projection; writes remain administrator-audited.

secrets.description: Keys, gateways, and environment variables are not exposed in the ordinary frontend.

details.adminProjection: Admin controls: runtime configuration, tenant switches, and platform parameters are layered by settings permissions.
details.auditProjection: Audit boundary: settings changes need actor, time, source, and rollback hints; ordinary pages stay read-only.
details.nextContract: Backed contract: personal preferences and system configuration reads are layered; keys and gateways stay redacted and permission-bound.
details.publicProjection: Current state: personal preferences and system settings read the safe projection, while writes remain administrator-governed.

settings.description: System settings read the safe workbench projection. Keys, gateways, and runtime configuration writes continue through administrator audit flows.

audit.description: Triage history and status changes remain audit-bound.

capture.description: Message-level feedback remains in chat; the standalone desk reads the aggregate projection.

triage.description: Assignment, closure, and label governance are not read from legacy feedback admin APIs.

details.adminProjection: Admin controls: feedback aggregation, assignment, closure, and label governance are layered by workbench permissions.
details.auditProjection: Audit boundary: state and owner changes need event history; legacy feedback admin reads are not the page source.
details.nextContract: Backed contract: aggregate feedback and assignment state are safe to read; triage writes remain permission-governed.
details.publicProjection: Current state: message-level chat feedback remains available and the standalone desk reads governed aggregate data.

feedback.description: Feedback is connected as a unified triage desk over the safe projection. Assignment, closure, and label writes remain permission- and audit-governed.

publicSelection.description: Chat still uses the current selectable agents; this page does not load the legacy config panel.

inbox.description: The unified inbox reads published notices and read-state projection data.

details.nextContract: Backed contract: runtime notices, the unified inbox, and announcement reads are layered; writes remain governed.
details.publicProjection: Current state: the top-bar notification entry and notification page read governed runtime notices.

governance.auditBacked: This projection advertises audit or rollback support.
